productName: BFF Besties Infused Preroll 2-Pack - NP - Nilla Pudding
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Nilla Pudding flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, delivering a smooth, well-rounded vibe. Pace yourself.
